creator: riccardo@torrini.org
text:
The patch-ab for emulators/xmame refer to xmake instead of xmame,
resulting in xmame unable to find roms.

Fix: 

Change xmake into xmame _BEFORE_ compile and install the port _OR_
change the contents of /usr/X11R6/share/xmame/xmamerc _AFTER_
How-To-Repeat: Look (with more/vi) into /usr/ports/emulators/xmame/patches/patch-ab
or try with "grep /xmake" on the same file
